Bitcoin is rising but gold isn’t backing down.

In past bull markets, Bitcoin crushed gold. Each cycle, one BTC bought you dramatically more gold.

Not this time.

Gold is making new all-time highs, and the Bitcoin-to-go

This week's Index in Focus highlighted the potential of a $BTC covered call strategy.

Our Bitcoin Covered Call Index (BTCC) has not only outperformed $BTC year-to-date, but had a smoother ride. Currently, BTCC’s rolling

Our $BTC Reference Rate is nearing its highest level since January, fuelled by renewed optimism around potential U.S. tariff reversals.

Over the past week, $BTC has outperformed both our large- and mid-cap crypto indice

Bitcoin is climbing.
The NASDAQ is sliding.
That kind of divergence doesn’t usually last.

Historically, when the NASDAQ’s 200-day moving average trend is down, Bitcoin runs into macro headwinds. https://t.co/OLUqqdk1dn

Breadth is leading the indices higher.

Probably to the surprise of many, the Cumulative Advance/Decline Line for the Nasdaq 100 recorded a new high on Friday, while the index itself is more than 5% off its own high.
